expectations.text: Identifies that the model has ZERO named ranges — a fundamental IDFA violation
expectations.evidence: Report states: 'Total formulas: 10, Formulas using Named Ranges: 0 (0%)' and G1 status: 'FAIL — 0 Named Ranges defined; 100% coordinate refs'.

expectations.text: Flags the hardcoded values 0.59 and 0.58 in the COGS formulas (D7, E7) as layer isolation violations
expectations.evidence: Error 2 section: 'Cells: D7 (=D6*0.59) and E7 (=E6*0.58). Problem: The COGS percentages for Year 2 and Year 3 are hardcoded magic numbers embedded directly in the formulas.'

expectations.text: Identifies that ALL formulas use cell-coordinate references instead of Named Ranges
expectations.evidence: The Complete Formula Inventory shows all 10 formulas using coordinates (B2, C6, B3, D6, B4, $B$10, etc.). States: 'Formulas with coordinate references: 10 (100%)'

expectations.text: Flags the WACC formula for LaTeX verification since it contains absolute cell references ($B$10, $B$12, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Appendix section includes LaTeX verification of WACC: 'WACC = E/(E+D) * Ke + D/(E+D) * Kd * (1-T)'. Notes in compliance: 'G2 — LaTeX Verification: FAIL — No verification notes on WACC formula'.

expectations.text: Notes the single-sheet structure violates IDFA three-layer separation (Assumptions / Calculations / Output)
expectations.evidence: 'Sheet Layout: The model contains a single sheet named "Model" with 16 rows and 5 columns. There is no separation into Assumptions, Calculations, and Output layers.' Layer Violations table shows Layer 2 and 3 as 'No'.

expectations.text: Provides a retrofitting plan that proposes Named Range names following IDFA conventions (Inp_ for inputs, Variable_Dimension for calculations)
expectations.evidence: Proposed Named Range Map lists: Inp_Rev_Y1, Inp_Rev_Growth, Inp_COGS_Pct_Y1, Inp_COGS_Efficiency (Inp_ prefix). Calculations: Revenue_Y1, COGS_Pct_Y1, Gross_Profit_Y1, WACC (Variable_Dimension pattern).

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to perform any calculations internally — only inspects model structure
expectations.evidence: The report inspects formulas, identifies structural issues, and provides a remediation plan. It does not compute model outputs. WACC LaTeX verification shows math to verify correctness of the existing formula, not to produce new values.

expectations.text: Produces a compliance score or percentage indicating the model's IDFA adherence level
expectations.evidence: Report states 'Overall IDFA Compliance: 0%' in the Executive Summary.
